zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Warde於1255年出生在英國越可爾卡爾福利時，她的父親Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley35歲，母親Margaret Neville21歲。她與Lord John Calverley, I結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1301年在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Warde于1255年出生在英国越可爾卡爾福利时，她的父亲Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley35岁，母亲Margaret Neville21岁。她与Lord John Calverley, I结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1301年在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Warde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

variants.name: Ward
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Warde was born in 1255, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley, was 35 and her mother, Margaret Neville, was 21. She married Lord John Calverley, I. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1301, in West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Warde est née en 1255, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Neville, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Lord John Calverley, I. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1301, à West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Warde 1255 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret Neville 21. Sie hat Lord John Calverley, I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1301 im Alter von 46 Jahren in West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Warde è nata il nel 1255 nel Calverley, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margaret Neville, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Lord John Calverley, I. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1301, nel West Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Wardeが1255年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父Sir William De la Warde of Guiseleyは35歳，母Margaret Nevilleは21歳であった。Lord John Calverley, Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1301年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Warde(이)가 1255년 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Neville(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Lord John Calverley, I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1301년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Warde nasceu em 1255, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Neville, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord John Calverley, I. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1301, em West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Warde родилась в 1255 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Neville, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord John Calverley, I. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1301 г. в местности вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Warde nació en 1255, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Neville, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lord John Calverley, I. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1301, en West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
